results.title: NBA 2K, Zynga and GTA drove Take-Two net bookings up 19% for 2026 fiscal year
results.description: Grand Theft Auto giant Take-Two Interactive has reported a 19% increase in both net revenue and net bookings for its 2026 financial year. Read more

results.title: Destiny developer Bungie will reportedly lay off a 'significant number' of people
results.description: Bungie is reportedly laying off a significant number of people and has not started work on Destiny 3.

results.title: Destiny Developer Bungie Will Reportedly Lay Off A 'Significant Number' Of People - Engadget
